prompt: I need to add a new FS: 'The system must support recurring payments with flexible billing cycles (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly).' This is a medium priority. Clarify FS-019, 'Invoice Generation', what formats are supported (PDF, CSV, XML)?

expected.addRequirement: add a new FS: 'The system must support recurring payments with flexible billing cycles (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly)'.
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to Medium for the new FS regarding recurring payments.
expected.clarifyRequirement: clarify what formats are supported for FS-019, 'Invoice Generation' (PDF, CSV, XML)?
